summary: Primary PA orchestration instructions and user-facing control messages.

releaseBlockingThresholds.threshold: at least 90% of applicable acceptance scenarios pass
at least 95% of ambiguity scenarios request clarification before execution
100% of side-effecting scenarios stop for explicit approval before execution
all curated specialist-selection scenarios pass in the retained Phase 2 evaluation fixture

requiredEvidence: structured evaluation results for the affected prompt and orchestration acceptance lanes
the passing tests/evals/*.test.ts run and the latest decision-quality artifact or equivalent retained evaluation record
comparison against the committed golden-task evidence fixture showing no regression
manual review notes for at least one critical-path end-to-end run
documented known limitations and deferred risks linked to the release decision
reevaluation.notes: Changes to PA orchestration prompts require regression coverage for plan creation, run creation, diagnostics, and release-blocking evaluation evidence, including routing >= 90%, clarification >= 95%, specialist-selection fixture pass status, and no golden-task regressions.

planningSteps.title: Clarify the objective
planningSteps.description: Clarify success criteria and intended outcome for: {{content}}

planningSteps.title: Map the work
planningSteps.description: Break the request into explicit execution-ready steps.

planningSteps.title: Prepare execution
planningSteps.description: Lock the plan so PA can execute against it without silent drift.

templates.planningAcknowledgement: PA drafted plan {{planId}}. Review it and lock it when you are ready to execute.
templates.executionAcknowledgement: PA started run {{runId}}. You can inspect tasks, events, and approvals while execution proceeds.
templates.chatAcknowledgement: PA received: "{{content}}". The {{modeSummary}} flow is active, and the platform can now create plans, runs, approvals, and event streams when needed.
